fld_description: Transect-segment identifier; primary key. Joins observations.
Source cruise label (e.g. CAC1987_05); cruise_key derived from it.
Time of day in seconds (local); combined with date into datetime_start_utc.
Latitude of the transect-segment midpoint, WGS84.
Longitude of the transect-segment midpoint, WGS84.
Seafloor depth at the segment (negative = below sea level in source).
TRUE if the taxon is a bird.
TRUE if the taxon is a mammal.
TRUE if the taxon is a fish.
TRUE if classified as a large bird.
TRUE if the record is unidentified to species.
